name: YNAB API
what_it_does: Provides programmatic access to YNAB budget data including accounts, transactions, categories, payees, and month summaries for personal budgeting automation and analysis.
use_cases: Automated transaction import and categorization agents
Spending analysis and trend reporting tools
Financial coaching and budget recommendation systems
Personal finance dashboards aggregating budget data
Recurring transaction and payee management automation
Budget goal tracking and alerting applications
not_for: Users who do not have an active YNAB subscription
Real-time payment processing or bank transfers
Accessing bank/brokerage data directly (YNAB is the intermediary)
best_when: Building automation or analytics on top of an existing YNAB workflow — great for agents that categorize transactions, analyze spending patterns, or generate budget reports
avoid_when: Users don't use YNAB, or you need direct bank/payment capabilities rather than budget management

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 for third-party apps; personal access tokens available for personal automation scripts. Personal tokens are ideal for agent use — no user interaction required after initial generation.

pricing.notes: API access is included with YNAB subscription at no additional cost. Free trial available. No separate API pricing tier.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-structured JSON error responses with error codes and human-readable detail messages; consistent error schema across endpoints
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Transaction creation supports idempotency via import_id field; GET endpoints fully idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth flow requires user interaction for third-party apps; use personal access tokens for autonomous agents
Rate limit of 200 req/hour is low for bulk import or analysis workflows
No webhooks — agents must poll for new transactions
Delta requests (server_knowledge parameter) required for efficient sync; naive polling is expensive
Budget ID required for every request — must be discovered via /budgets endpoint first
Requires active YNAB subscription; API access unavailable if subscription lapses

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced; personal access tokens are revocable; OAuth for third-party apps; financial data sensitivity warrants careful token handling; no scope granularity on personal tokens
